summary: Stabilized Venice, Uniswap, Bankr, and Celo test harnesses with explicit Supabase proxy URL configuration. Added vitest.config.ts with environment-level test env vars, a centralized test-env.ts module, and rewrote three integration test suites (bankr-gateway, uniswap-client, venice-client) to use deterministic proxy URLs instead of implicit env values. Also documented the environment setup in .factory/library/environment.md.

strengths: Centralized TEST_*_PROXY_URL constants in test-env.ts prevent URL-mismatch drift across suites
vitest.config.ts env block sets proxy URLs at the test-runner level, avoiding per-file boilerplate
All three test suites use thorough positive and negative test cases with proper fetch mocking
Environment documentation in library/environment.md is detailed and useful for future workers

testCoverage.notes: 294 lines for bankr-gateway, 633 for uniswap-client, 208 for venice-client. All pass deterministically.
